title: onobrychis pyrenaica
intro: Onobrychis pyrenaica, also known as Pyrenean bird's foot trefoil, is a flowering plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis pyrenaica include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments.
